log.context:
**Root cause and fix:**

The flapping was caused by two competing alertmanager instances:

1. Someone ran `apt-get install prometheus-alertmanager` which installed v0.26.0 as a system service. This started first and bound both :9093 (HTTP) and :9094 (cluster gossip).

2. The existing user-level `alertmanager.service` (v0.27.0 at `/usr/local/bin/alertmanager`, reading `/mnt/data/monitoring/alertmanager.yml`) tried to start afterward and crash-looped 15 times — first failing on port 9094 (cluster ...(truncated)
